neighborhoods.name: Downtown Sarasota
neighborhoods.description: Walkable downtown core along the bayfront with cultural venues, restaurants, Selby Gardens, and Bayfront Park
neighborhoods.character: Urban walkable, cultural, bayfront living, retiree-popular

housing.predominantType: Bayfront condos, mid-rise apartments, and some historic bungalows

neighborhoods.character_notes: Ringling Museum, Sarasota Opera, and Selby Botanical Gardens. Saturday farmers market. Strong arts and culture scene popular with retirees.

neighborhoods.name: Siesta Key
neighborhoods.description: Barrier island known for its white quartz sand beach, consistently ranked among top US beaches, with a laid-back village center
neighborhoods.character: Beach island, relaxed, vacation-feel year-round, nature-oriented

housing.predominantType: Beach condos, single-family homes, and some older cottages

neighborhoods.character_notes: Siesta Key Village has shops and restaurants. Bridge to mainland Sarasota. Very seasonal — busy in winter, quieter in summer. Dog beach available.

neighborhoods.name: Downtown St. Petersburg
neighborhoods.description: Revitalized waterfront downtown with the Dali Museum, craft breweries, murals, and a walkable grid along Tampa Bay
neighborhoods.character: Urban arts district, walkable waterfront, craft beer culture, progressive

housing.predominantType: Condos, loft conversions, and mid-rise apartments

neighborhoods.character_notes: Major arts renaissance in recent years. Dali Museum, Imagine Museum. Saturday Morning Market. More walkable than most Florida cities.

sources.title: Numbeo Cost of Living St. Petersburg FL

neighborhoods.name: Venice, FL
neighborhoods.description: Small city south of Sarasota with an Italian-inspired downtown, Venice Beach, and a strong retiree community
neighborhoods.character: Small-town retiree haven, Italian-themed downtown, shark tooth beaches
neighborhoods.character_notes: Known for shark tooth fossil hunting on beaches. Venetian Waterway Park trail. Many 55+ active adult communities. Quieter than Sarasota.

sources.title: Numbeo Cost of Living Venice FL

neighborhoods.name: Downtown Fort Myers / River District
neighborhoods.description: Revitalized downtown along the Caloosahatchee River with Edison & Ford estates, restaurants, and a growing urban core
neighborhoods.character: Revitalizing downtown, river views, historic estates, more affordable

housing.predominantType: Condos, apartments, and historic homes in surrounding neighborhoods

neighborhoods.character_notes: Edison & Ford Winter Estates. River District nightlife. More affordable than Sarasota. Southwest Florida International Airport nearby.

sources.title: Numbeo Cost of Living Fort Myers
